name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Singapore
tagline: India's leading international school brand, anchored in Singapore innovation
description: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Singapore is one of the largest international schools in the country, serving approximately 3,000 students across its Punggol Smart Campus and East Coast campus. GIIS offers multiple curricula including CBSE (Central Board of Secondary Education), Cambridge IGCSE, and the IB Diploma Programme, allowing families to choose the pathway that best suits their child. The flagship Punggol campus is a next-generation 'smart campus' featuring data-driven learning analytics, digital classrooms, and cutting-edge STEM facilities. GIIS is part of the Global Schools Foundation, with campuses across Asia.

admission.process: Submit an online application with academic records. Students sit for a grade-appropriate entrance assessment. GIIS offers a merit-based scholarship programme for high-performing students.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions. Academic year runs April to March. Multiple intake windows.

faqs.question: What makes the GIIS Punggol campus a 'smart campus'?
faqs.answer: The Punggol Smart Campus uses data analytics, facial recognition for attendance, digital classrooms with interactive panels, and real-time learning dashboards to personalise education.

faqs.question: Does GIIS offer scholarships?
faqs.answer: Yes, GIIS offers multiple scholarship programmes including the Global Future-Ready Merit Scholarship and the 9GEMS Holistic Development Scholarship for students excelling in academics, sports, or the arts.

seo.title: GIIS Singapore — CBSE, IBDP & IGCSE at Punggol Smart Campus | EduAtlas
seo.description: Global Indian International School Singapore: 3,000 students at Punggol Smart Campus. CBSE, IBDP, IGCSE, Montessori. Scholarships available. View 2026 fees and admission info.
